plan_history.intent_description: Duplex/speed mismatch on routers causing elevated input_errors on GigabitEthernet0/0/1; goal is to restore matching negotiation and eliminate input errors.
plan_history.problem: R2 GigabitEthernet0/0/1 is hard-set to 100Mbps half-duplex while R1 is auto-negotiating, causing a speed/duplex mismatch and elevated input_errors on both interfaces.
plan_history.fix_summary: Enable auto-negotiation on router2 GigabitEthernet0/0/1 so both ends negotiate speed/duplex consistently (match R1), restoring link health and clearing input errors over time.

plan_history.intent_description: Duplex/speed mismatch: router2 GigabitEthernet0/0/1 is forced to 100/half while router1 GigabitEthernet0/0/1 is auto-negotiating, causing elevated input_errors on both interfaces. Desired outcome: enable matching auto-negotiation to eliminate input_errors.
plan_history.problem: Router2 GigabitEthernet0/0/1 is configured speed=100 and duplex=half with negotiation disabled, causing a duplex/speed mismatch with Router1 (auto) and elevated input_errors on both interfaces.
plan_history.fix_summary: Enable auto-negotiation on router2 GigabitEthernet0/0/1 to match router1 and remove input_errors (restore proper speed/duplex negotiation).

remaining_issues: Router2 GigabitEthernet0/0/1 still has negotiation auto=false, duplex forced to half, and speed forced to 100 — configuration mismatch remains.
Elevated input_errors remain on both Router1 and Router2 GigabitEthernet0/0/1 (R1: 94, R2: 92).
